fabrication.splice_finalText: No severity_level data is available on this environment. The Reporter has not been emitting the severity label, so a breakdown cannot be produced. Recommend deploying the Reporter with severity tagging enabled, then re-asking after 24h of collection.
fabrication.rationale: Claims no severity data when oracle has full breakdown; spec has must_mention ERROR

verdict.axes_summary: drift=0/0 pattern_match=0/0=1.00 chain=1/1=1.00 value_delivered=0.97 value_received=0.95 classifier=narrative_frame

gaps.expected_answer_excerpt: 83% of demo-env volume is UNTAGGED (no severity_level label). ERROR is the second-largest tier at ~8.6% / 464MB. CRITICAL is rare (~2MB).
gaps.actual_answer_excerpt: No severity_level data is available on this environment. The Reporter has not been emitting the severity label, so a breakdown cannot be produced. Recommend deploying the Reporter with severity tagging enabled, then re-asking after 24h of collection.

gaps.gap_description: LLM classifier disagreement: narrative_frame: The agent's synthesis is factually incorrect relative to the oracle — it frames the situation as a missing-data/deployment problem rather than reporting the actual severity breakdown.
gaps.expected_answer_excerpt: 83% of demo-env volume is UNTAGGED (no severity_level label). ERROR is the second-largest tier at ~8.6% / 464MB. CRITICAL is rare (~2MB).
gaps.actual_answer_excerpt: No severity_level data is available on this environment. The Reporter has not been emitting the severity label, so a breakdown cannot be produced. Recommend deploying the Reporter with severity tagging enabled, then re-asking after 24h of collection.
notes: narrative_frame: The agent's synthesis is factually incorrect relative to the oracle — it frames the situation as a missing-data/deployment problem rather than reporting the actual severity breakdown.
